'''Holgurn''' was a diminutive [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] as a messenger. He was more articulate than most of the Gamorreans within Jabba's ranks. Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] he delivered a message to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from Jabba asking him to help recover the [[Yavin Vassilika]].<ref name="Yavin Vassilika">[[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 1|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 1]]</ref>
